footer.tagline: Mizoram a hna awm te zawnna leh puanzarna awlsam .

home.hero_subtitle: Hna thar ber te awlsam takin zawng rawh. Mizoram district hrang hrang a hna ruak te zawnna.
home.search_placeholder: Hna hming, hmun, emaw company hmingin zawng rawh...

about.title: Hnaruak Mizoram Chanchin
about.description: Hnaruak Mizoram hi Mizoram a hna ruak zawng zawng hmun khatah awlsam taka zawn theih nana siam a ni. Hna zawngtute leh hnatuaktute inkar he platform hmang hian kan thlunzawm a ni.
about.mission_desc: Hna zawngtute leh hnatuaktute awlsam taka thlunzawm. Hna petute'n tlawm takin hna an tar chhuak thei a, hna zawngtute'n a thlawpin in-register lo pawhin an zawng thei a ni.
about.why_us_1: Mizo leh English a hman theihna: I duh zawk zawkin awlsam takin i hmang thei.
about.why_us_2: Self-Serve Payment: Razorpay hmanga awlsam taka payment siam.
about.why_us_3: Simple & Direct: Account siam ngai lo a hna zawn nghal theihna.

contact.title: Biak Pawhna
contact.subtitle: Zawhna emaw harsatna i neih chuan a hnuaia kan biak pawhna hmang hian min be pawh thei ang.
contact.success_msg: I thuchah thawn a ni ta e. Kan lo chhang thuai dawn nia.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: India’s Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA), kum 2023 chuan mi mal chanchin (personal data)  lak khawm,  hman leh  dah ṭhat dan turah dan khauh tak a siam a.
privacy.section_1_desc: Hna pe tute: Hming, email, phone number, company address, logo. Hna zawngtute: Search queries, device IP address, browser chi (cookies emaw Algolia logging hmangin mahniin a in-collect).
privacy.section_2_desc: Data hi hna zawngna platform kalpui nan, hna chhuah te enfiah nan, bumna laka inven nan leh sumdawnna thil tihfel nan chauh hman a ni.
privacy.section_3_desc: I data hi kan platform kalpui nana pawimawh, kan rin ngam third-party service provider-te hnenah chauh hlan a ni. Chungah chuan Algolia (search index caching atan) leh kan hosting leh email delivery infrastructure him tak te a tel a ni.
privacy.section_4_desc: Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) angin, user-te chu Data Principal an nih angin an mahni personal data chungchangah dikna chanvo bîk an nei a. Chûng zîngah chuan an data sawiho (processed data) tlangpui hriat theihna chanvo, dik lo siamṭhat emaw hriat kim lohte tihfamkimna chanvo, leh an personal data paih leh tihbo phût theihna chanvo te a tel a ni.
privacy.section_5_desc: Employer-in account a delete chuan a hna puanzar zawng zawng public view aṭangin a thup vek ang.

terms.title: Terms and Condition
terms.subtitle: He Terms and condition hi Hnaruak Mizoram leh a user te (hnatuakte leh hna zawngte) inkar contract pawimawh a ni. He platform hi i hmang chuan term te hi i pawm a ni.
terms.section_1_desc: Hna zawngte hnenah hna zawng leh dil nan pawisa lak a ni lo. Hna zawng leh dil tana feature zawng zawng hi free a ni.
terms.section_2_title: 2. Hna thawh tur kan tiam lo.
terms.section_2_desc: Hnaruak Mizoram hi hna zawngtu leh hna advertise-na hmun a ni. Hna kan tiam lo va, interview emaw, hnathawktute hnen aṭanga chhanna emaw pawh kan tiam lo. Hna lak chungchangah hian hna pe tute (employer) chauh thu neitu an ni.
terms.section_3_desc: User-te chuan 'Report' feature hi a dik taka hman tur an ni. Report feature hi mi tihduhdah nan te, tum bik nei a beih nan te, emaw hnathawktute chungchangah dawt thu phuahchawp nan te hman phal a ni lo.
terms.section_4_title: 4. Hna Post tu te leh hna zawngtute inkar buaina
terms.section_4_desc: Hna zawngtute leh hna post tute inkara inhnialna emaw harsatna lo awm apiang chu website neitu mawhphurhna a ni lo. He platform hian chutiang buainaah chuan inrawlh emaw hma lak emaw a tum lo.
terms.section_5_desc: Hna thawktute chuan inziahluhnaah hian an hnathawhna chungchang dik leh finfiah theih, phone number nung, email address dik leh inziahluhna address dik tak an pe tur a ni. Thu dik lo pekte chu an account tih tawp sak an ni thei.
terms.section_6_desc: Hna chungchang dawt, bumna, inang chiah, emaw thliarhranna awm thei chi chhuah chu khap tlat a ni. Hei hian Equal Remuneration Act emaw labour law hman mekte bawhchhiatna engpawh a huam tel a ni. Hna thawktute chuan he policy hnuaia platform-in hma a lakna chungchangah sawisel an nei thei lo.
terms.section_7_desc: Kan platform-ah hian hna post a thlawn vek a ni..
terms.section_8_desc: Hna thawktu zawngtute chuan PDF circular an upload-te chu chhuah phalna leh dikna an nei tih an tiam a, file zawng zawngte chu malware, virus, emaw thil hmingchhiatna leh dan lova thil awmte lakah a fihlim tih an nemnghet bawk.
terms.section_9_title: 5. Hna Post tu leh hna zawngtute inhnialna:
terms.section_9_desc: Hna Post tu leh hna zawngtute inkarah inhnialna emaw harsatna a awm chuan website neitu mawhphurhna a ni lo va, website owner in chung chungchangah chuan engmah hma a la dawn lo.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: Payment refund chungchang.
refund.section_1_desc: Hna puanzar a live tawh hnuah pawisa refund theih a ni lo.
refund.section_2_desc: Razorpay hmanga secured taka process a ni. Payment a luh loh chuan hna tar chhuah a ni lo ang.
refund.section_3_desc: Harsatna a awm a, pawisa a luh hnuah hna a live loh chuan min be pawh thuai la, darkar 24 chhungin kan lo Chingfel ang.
